description.value:
Plant grafts, living organs, and alien parts supplement the synthetic parts of your body. You might have been built for espionage, designed as a devastating biotech weapon, or created to coexist with nature.

You don't gain the attribute flaw to Charisma but instead gain a flaw to Constitution. You become trained in Nature and gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Train Animal] skill feat.
